name: Chocolate Chip Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream butter, cream cheese, sugar, brown sugar, egg, and vanilla in a mixer bowl until light and fluffy.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and mix well.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and chopped cherries.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Place a cherry half on top of each cookie.
7. Bake for 8 minutes or until set. Remove from oven immediately and transfer to a wire rack to cool.
Yield: 3 dozen
